---
title: "Construction Production Index Forecast [2021=100]"
author: "Zehra Kaya"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
library(readxl)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(forecast)
library(tseries)
```

## 1. Data Preparation

```{r veri}
veri <- read_excel("C:/Users/user/Downloads/insaat.xlsx", skip = 8)
colnames(veri) <- c("period", "activity_group", "nace", "index", 
                    "calendar_index", "change", "seasonal_index", "seasonal_change")

data_clean <- veri |>
  filter(grepl("^\\[F\\]", nace)) |>
  select(period, index) |>
  mutate(
    period = as.Date(paste0(period, "-01")),
    index = as.numeric(index)
  ) |>
  arrange(period)

cat("Number of observations:", nrow(data_clean), "\n")
cat("Start:", as.character(min(data_clean$period)), "\n")
cat("End:", as.character(max(data_clean$period)), "\n")
```

## 2. Time Series Plot

```{r plot}
ggplot(data_clean, aes(x = period, y = index)) +
  geom_line(color = "steelblue", linewidth = 1) +
  labs(title = "Construction Production Index [2021=100]",
       x = "Time", y = "Index") +
  theme_minimal()
```

## 3. Stationarity Test (ADF)

```{r adf}
ts_data <- ts(data_clean$index, start = c(2017, 1), frequency = 12)
adf_test <- adf.test(ts_data)
print(adf_test)
```

## 4. ACF and PACF

```{r acf}
par(mfrow = c(1, 2))
acf(ts_data, main = "ACF")
pacf(ts_data, main = "PACF")
```

## 5. Model 1: ARIMA (Auto)

```{r arima}
model_arima <- auto.arima(ts_data)
summary(model_arima)
```

## 6. Model 2: ETS

```{r ets}
model_ets <- ets(ts_data)
summary(model_ets)
```

## 7. Model 3: Holt-Winters

```{r hw}
model_hw <- HoltWinters(ts_data)
print(model_hw)
```

## 8. Forecast (2026-04)

```{r forecast}
forecast_arima <- forecast(model_arima, h = 1)
forecast_ets <- forecast(model_ets, h = 1)
forecast_hw <- forecast(model_hw, h = 1)

cat("ARIMA Forecast:", round(forecast_arima$mean[1], 2), "\n")
cat("ETS Forecast:", round(forecast_ets$mean[1], 2), "\n")
cat("Holt-Winters Forecast:", round(forecast_hw$mean[1], 2), "\n")
```

## 9. Forecast Plot

```{r forecast_plot}
autoplot(forecast(model_arima, h = 6)) +
  labs(title = "ARIMA Forecast",
       x = "Time", y = "Index") +
  theme_minimal()
```

## 10. Model Comparison

```{r comparison}
comparison <- data.frame(
  Model = c("ARIMA", "ETS", "Holt-Winters"),
  AIC = c(model_arima$aic, model_ets$aic, NA),
  RMSE = c(
    accuracy(model_arima)[2],
    accuracy(model_ets)[2],
    sqrt(mean(residuals(model_hw)^2))
  )
)
print(comparison)
```
